college.name: Kingston Engineering College
college.address: Chittoor Main Road, Vellore, Tamil Nadu – 632 059
college.about: Kingston Engineering College is an autonomous institution approved by AICTE and affiliated to Anna University. We have achieved NAAC 'A' grade and are committed to providing world-class education in engineering and technology.

intents.title: Hello! Welcome to Kingston 👋
content_points: I'm your Kingston Engineering College assistant.
I can help you with admissions, fees, placements, departments, facilities, and much more.
What would you like to know today?

intents.title: Admission at Kingston 🎓
content_points: B.E. / B.Tech: 12th pass with Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics
B.Arch: 12th pass with 50% aggregate and passed Maths
M.Tech: B.E./B.Tech degree in relevant branch
MBA: Any graduation with valid CAT/MAT score
B.E. admissions happen through TNEA counselling by Anna University
Direct admission available for NRI and management quota seats

intents.title: Fee Structure 💰
content_points: B.E. / B.Tech: ₹1,60,000 per annum
B.Arch: ₹1,80,000 per annum
M.Tech: ₹1,50,000 per annum
MBA: ₹2,00,000 per annum
Hostel (Boys & Girls): ₹1,00,000 per annum (optional)
Transportation: Available – fees vary by distance
Scholarships available for SC/ST, BC, MBC, and merit students

intents.title: Placements at Kingston 📊
content_points: Placement Rate: 95%+ consistently
Highest Package: ₹25 LPA
Average Package: ₹6.5 LPA
Top Recruiters: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Amazon, Microsoft, Zoho, Cognizant
Dedicated Placement & Training Cell with industry partnerships
On-campus drives, mock interviews, and aptitude training provided

intents.title: Contact Kingston 📞
content_points: 📧 Email: admission@kingston.ac.in
📱 Admission Helpline: +91-75400-37999
📍 Address: Chittoor Main Road, Vellore, Tamil Nadu – 632 059
🕐 Office Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9 AM – 5 PM

intents.title: Academic Departments 🏛️
content_points: Computer Science & Engineering (CSE)
CSE with AI & ML, CSE with Business Systems (CSBS)
Artificial Intelligence & Data Science (AI&DS)
Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE)
Mechanical Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering (EEE)
Information Technology (IT), Civil Engineering
Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch)
Masters in Business Administration (MBA), M.Tech

intents.title: Hostel Facilities 🏠
content_points: Separate well-secured hostels for Boys and Girls
Hostel fee: ₹1,00,000 per annum (including mess)
Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner provided
24/7 security, CCTV surveillance
Wi-Fi connectivity in hostel rooms
Laundry, medical room, and recreational facilities available

intents.title: Scholarships & Financial Aid 🏆
content_points: SC/ST/MBC students: Government scholarship up to full tuition fee
BC students: Tamil Nadu Government BC scholarship
EWS (Economically Weaker Section): Special fee concessions
Merit scholarship for top academic performers
Sports quota: Fee concessions for district/state level achievers
Apply through Tamil Nadu e-Scholarship portal

intents.title: Accreditation & Recognition 🏅
content_points: NAAC Accredited with 'A' Grade
NBA accredited – all eligible engineering programs
AICTE approved institution
Affiliated to Anna University, Chennai
ISO 21001:2018 certified for quality education
Recognised under UGC Act 2(f) and 12(B)
Ranked among top colleges in Tamil Nadu

intents.title: Campus Facilities 🏫
content_points: Modern computing labs with high-speed internet
Central Library with 50,000+ books and digital resources
Sports complex: cricket, football, basketball, volleyball courts
Separate Boys & Girls hostels with mess facility
Cafeteria and food courts on campus
Wi-Fi enabled campus with 1 Gbps connectivity
Health centre with on-call doctor and ambulance

intents.title: Library 📚
content_points: Central library with 50,000+ print books
Subscribed to DELNET, e-ShodhSindhu for digital journals
Online databases: IEEE, Springer, Elsevier access
NPTEL and online course resources
Spacious reading hall with 250+ seating capacity
Open from 8 AM – 8 PM on weekdays

intents.title: Sports & Athletics ⚽
content_points: Sports complex with outdoor and indoor facilities
Cricket ground, football field, basketball & volleyball courts
Badminton, table tennis, and chess facilities
Regular inter-collegiate sports tournaments
Students have represented at district, state, and national levels
Sports scholarships available for meritorious athletes

intents.title: Transport & Bus Routes 🚌
content_points: College buses operate on 30+ routes covering Vellore and nearby areas
Routes cover: Vellore, Ambur, Ranipet, Arakkonam, Katpadi, Gudiyatham
Buses depart from campus in the morning and return in the evening
Bus fee varies by distance (contact admin for current rates)
Campus is on Chittoor Main Road, easily accessible from Vellore bus stand

intents.title: Clubs & Activities 🎭
content_points: Technical clubs: IEEE, CSI, ISTE chapters on campus
Cultural associations: Music, Dance, Drama, Fine Arts
NSS unit for community service and social activities
IIC (Institution's Innovation Council) for startup culture
Department-level associations host annual technical symposiums
Regular hackathons, coding contests, and workshops

intents.title: Research & Innovation 🔬
content_points: Active Research & Development Cell with funded projects
Faculty have published 500+ research papers in indexed journals
Patents filed by faculty and students
Collaborations with DRDO, CSIR, DST for sponsored research
Students can participate in research projects from Year 2
IIC on campus supports startup ideas and innovation

intents.title: Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) 💻
content_points: One of the largest and most sought-after departments at Kingston
Specialisations: AI&ML, Data Science, Cloud, Cybersecurity
State-of-the-art computing labs with latest software
95%+ placement rate with top IT companies
Active IEEE and CSI student chapters
Regular hackathons, coding contests, and project expos

intents.title: Alumni Network 🤝
content_points: Strong alumni base of 15,000+ graduates across the world
Alumni placed in leading companies like TCS, Amazon, Microsoft, Infosys
Several alumni have started their own companies
Alumni meets and networking events held every year
Distinguished alumni contribute as mentors for current students
Register as an alumnus to stay connected

intents.title: Higher Education & Further Studies 🎓
content_points: M.Tech program available in select departments
Many alumni have pursued MS/M.Tech from IITs, NITs, and abroad
GATE coaching and guidance provided on campus
GRE/TOEFL preparation support for students going abroad
MBA available for graduates seeking management careers
Dedicated placement cell also supports higher education aspirants

intents.title: Internships & Industrial Training 🏭
content_points: Mandatory internship during summer semester (B.E. 3rd year)
Industry connect program ties up with 50+ companies for internships
Students get placed in Zoho, Freshworks, TCS, Infosys for internships
In-plant training and industrial visits for all departments
Projects done during internship can be submitted as final year project
Stipend-based internships available through placement cell

intents.title: IQAC – Quality Assurance Cell ⭐
content_points: Internal Quality Assurance Cell (IQAC) ensures continuous quality improvement
Annual Quality Assurance Reports (AQARs) submitted to NAAC
Regular academic audits and faculty feedback collection
Strategic development plans formulated and monitored by IQAC
Student feedback drives improvements in teaching and infrastructure

intents.title: You're Welcome! 😊
content_points: Happy to help! Feel free to ask any other question.
You can explore more about Kingston Engineering College on our website.

intents.title: Goodbye! 👋
content_points: Thank you for using Kingston's AI Assistant.
Visit us at Chittoor Main Road, Vellore or call +91-416-2244777.
Good luck with your journey ahead!

intents.title: About Kingston Engineering College 🏛️
content_points: Established in 1999 in Vellore, Tamil Nadu
AICTE approved, affiliated to Anna University, Chennai
NAAC 'A' Grade | NBA Accredited | ISO 21001:2018 certified
Recognised under UGC Act 2(f) and 12(B)
Over 5,000 students across UG, PG and research programs
Located on Chittoor Main Road, Vellore – 632 059
